name: Chicken Noodle Soup
recipeIngredient: 2 cups Cooked Chicken or Turkey, diced
recipeInstructions:
1. In a 3-quart (3 L) saucepan, combine broth, water, celery, carrot, onion, parsley, poultry seasoning and thyme. Heat over medium heat until boiling, stirring occasionally.
2. Reduce heat to low. Cover; cook for 20 minutes or until vegetables are tender, stirring occasionally. Add chicken and noodles; heat through, stirring occasionally.
Serving Size: Makes about 7 cups (1.8 L) or 4 main-dish servings.
